description: Backend data contract for Add Teacher page – multi-step form (personal info, teaching details, access credentials).

getDropdownOptions.description: Fetch static dropdown data: subjects, classes, qualifications, salutations.

checkEmailAvailability.description: Check if email is already used by any teacher.

checkPhoneAvailability.description: Check if phone number is already used.

requestBody.salutation: string (required, one of Mr., Ms., Mrs., Dr.)
requestBody.subject: string (required, must be in allowed subjects list)
requestBody.qualification: string (required, must be in allowed qualifications list)
assignedClasses: array of strings (required, at least one, each class must exist)

404.message: One or more assigned classes not found

fieldNotes.confirmPassword: Not sent to backend – validated only on frontend.
fieldNotes.assignedClasses: Class names must match exactly the values in the dropdown list.
fieldNotes.employeeId: Optional, must be unique if provided.
fieldNotes.joiningDate: Optional – defaults to current date if not provided.
